title: LayerDArtifact
description: Structured residue from Layer D (Generative Reflection) — one entry per feature, appended to .aiwg/working/ring/layer_d.jsonl

feature.description: Name or description of the feature built

spec_assumptions_invalidated.description: What the spec assumed that turned out wrong during implementation

environment_assumptions_found.description: Proprioceptive discoveries: port, PATH, interpreter, stale state, shell behavior

unexpected_interactions.description: How this feature touched other features unexpectedly

adversarial_cases.description: What would break this feature — candidate new test cases or gates

archetype_if_failed.description: Which failure archetype was triggered, or null if no failure occurred
